DetailedDescription: Weakest Link: A great sports car is nothing without a set of sticky tires..Just like a great projector is nothing without precise bulb alignment. Though the Morimoto Mini H1 projector has undoubtedly gotten better and better with every generation... even the latest 7.0 version still comes standard with the same old damn bulb holder. Sure, they work, but that doesn't mean they work well, at least well-enough for all of us Headlight Junkies! Story Time: It wasn't until our shopMatt retrofitted a set of Morimoto Mini H1 7.0's in his own car and realized that the struggle is indeed real. Alas, the man himself can't have a whack beam pattern... it was time to step up and finally do something about it. So he picked up the phone, called the engineer, revved up the CNC mill, and here we have it! Problem solved. Better, Not Bigger: Designed by Morimoto in California, the MotoHo1der is way more effective but virtually no bigger overall than the old clip setup. The clever three-piece design provides even pressure on the back of the bulb, ensuring perfect alignment. To be honest, we think it's the single best upgrade to the projector that's ever been conceived. Plastic makes it Possible: Yeah, that's right - they're made of injection molded plastic! Using BASF Ultramid A3WG6 plastic which is reinforced with glass fiber for excellent dimensional stability, stiffness, and temperature resistance up to 280C (530F) - they should withstand the test of time no matter if you're a 35W or 50W user. Price is Right: If you've already got a set of headlights retrofitted with Mini H1 projectors, there is no better place to put your $20 than investing in the MotoHo1ders. Poor cutoff? Out of focus hotspot? Weak distribution? Drives you nuts every time you pull into the garage? Yeah, we know the feeling, and as long as your bulbs are good, these will resolve the rest!
WhatsIncluded1: Bulb Holder: 1x Morimoto Mini H1 MotoHo1ders Bulb Holder

DetailedDescription: Totally Glandular: Passing through the housing wall and want the cleanest means to do it? Do it with the glands! These were brought into our catalog due to demand from our dealers! Plastic 'n Rubber: Comprised of both plastic and rubber materials, these are designed in such a way to thread together and seal against the housing wall. The tip of the gland is a rubber conical piece that is compressed against the wires passing through them to seal everything off nice'n tidy. Two Sizes: Available in the two most popular sizes: 9mm and 11mm before compression (the area where the wire passes through the glands). These little guys should fit where you need them and allow just the right amount of pressure for however many wires you're running through them.
TechSpecs2: MOUNT TO: Metal, plastic, glass, or rubber surfaces
WhatsIncluded1: GLAND: 1x 9mm Cable Gland

DisplayName: XBG LED Grille: Ford Super Duty (20-22 / Black / Amber DRL)
DetailedDescription: Can you see me now? With full LED headlights, tail tights, and off-road lights, You have no problem seeing at night, but that's not what this is all about. The XBG grille from Morimoto pairs high visibility with an OEM+ style and easy installation for a perfect way to finish off the front-end of your custom Super Duty.Daytime Running Lights: Using the same automotive grade optics and Osram LEDs that come standard in Morimotos XB LED headlights, the integrated DRL Bars are insanely bright, easily visible even from afar in broad daylight! In fact, the daytime mode is so bright that the light bars will auto-dim in parking light, low beam, or high beam mode out of necessity in order to reduce glare at dusk or in the dark. These are available with either a white or amber daytime running light.No Comparison: Put side-by-side during the day with other existing options in the aftermarket or anything you could DIY at home, and the quality, consistency, and intensity out of the Morimoto optics would make the everything else look like a joke. If you are serious about the looks and performance of the parts you put on your truck, the XBG is the new no brainer.Customize It: The XBG grilles are highly customizable. Whether your truck is stacked with chrome or color-coordinated to the max, there is a XBG spec perfect for you. The front trim pieces can be removed with ease, painted (or wrapped), and then reassembled. Both the Chrome and Gloss Black versions are ready to install right out of the box, but if you prefer to color match, we recommend going with the black base grille. Either way, the finished look is sure to impress!Compatible: With all versions of the Ford Super Duty trucks from 2020-2022, the XBG LED DRL grilles are extremely easy to install. They use all the stock mounting points, hardware, and shouldn't take more than 30-60 minutes to install. While the color/intensity is a perfect match for the Morimoto XB headlights, they'll also look great alongside a set of OEM LED or any other aftermarket headlights too.Plug n Play: The XBG DRL bars have two intensities that automatically illuminate day and night based off the signals from the original headlight wiring that they're designed to connect with. The default setup intercepts the headlight signals from Super Duties with the standard halogen headlights. An adapter harness is also included for trucks that came with the original equipment LED headlights. No modifications required.
TechSpecs2: Material: ABS Plastic (Grille Assembly), UV-Resistant Polycarbonate (Lens)
TechSpecs3: Trim Finish: Chrome or Gloss Black
WhatsIncluded1: Grille: 1x Morimoto XBG LED DRL Grille System
WhatsIncluded2: DRL Bars: 2x XBG LED DRL Bars (Pre-installed) (White or Amber)
WhatsIncluded3: Trim: Front Trim Kit (Pre-installed) (Chrome or Gloss Black)
WhatsIncluded4: Wire Harness: Plug n Play Connection kit for Halogen or OE LED Trucks
Compatibility2: Wiring: Plug n Play on trucks with halogen or OE LED headlamps
Compatibility3: DRL Match: Guaranteed optical/Kelvin match for Morimoto XB LED headlights (LF508 or LF556 Series) (White or Amber)
Compatibility4: NOTE: These grilles have been designed for, and tested on, US-Spec vehicles. Other countries' compatibility may vary and is not guaranteed nor always known.

The front trim pieces can be removed with ease, painted (or wrapped), and then reassembled. Both the chrome and gloss black versions are ready to install right out of the box, but if you prefer to color match - we recommend going with the black base grille. DisplayName: Morimoto Rock Light Kit: RGB LED / 4 Pack
DetailedDescription: Rock On: This is the setup that delivers the performance, intensity, and reliability that Morimoto customers have come to expect. Designed and engineered for the most popular trucks and SUVs here in the USA, our rock light system includes everything needed to complete the install, but without the guess work that plagues too many big brand rock light kits on the market today.    Brighter: Our proprietary second gen rock lights are designed to maximize intensity for well-lit trails and city streets alike. Each puck uses 6x 3W RGB LEDs projecting through a high clarity polycarbonate lens, so no matter how you are using them, you can easily see and be seen. While theres nothing wrong with two, one puck will easily illuminate the entire wheel well with a virtually infinite variety of colors. RGB Bluetooth Controller: You can easily manage the zones, colors, effects, pre-sets, and save favorites from the Morimoto XBT Color Control app, which is compatible the latest Android and iOS phones. The RGBW-capable controller has an extra output channel (un-used by the rock light kits) which will allow you to add and control an additional set of RGB or RGBW lights from the same app. Its mounting bracket is also made out of carbon fiber. Why? Why not?  Easy Install: We've integrated two different mounting options to make for an easy-install. The shell has integrated mounting points on each side if you have a hard surface to screw into. Each kit includes also rubberized magnetic mounts that are easily strong enough to make for a reliable no-drill installation. Each magnet is rated for an 8kg  (17.6lbs)  load, which is approximately 40 times more than the weight of each rock light.  Plug n Play: The kit comes complete with a wire harness to control the system. Controlled by an in-cabin push button switch, the harness will pull 12V from any position inside the fuse box, and includes all splitters and extensions to neatly route the wiring to each corner of your vehicle. Each kit also includes a set of convenient extension cables to help ensure your wiring lengths are just right, regardless of an install on a two-door Jeep or modern HD truck. With over-molded splitters and fully sealed barrel connections from end to end, long-term reliability won't be a concern either.   Bash Proof: Backed with a lifetime limited warranty, the Morimoto Rock Light system is built to last. The beefy diecast housings have been powder-coated with the same finish as our Banger off road LED pods, and the 2mm thick lens is molded from Makrolon Polycarbonate, known for its strength in tough automotive applications.
